name: claude-skill-tracker
description: Track Claude Code skill usage to your CLIProxy Dashboard

scripts.docs:bundle: BUNDLE_GEMFILE=Gemfile BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle BUNDLE_APP_CONFIG=.bundle BUNDLE_DISABLE_SHARED_GEMS=true bundle install
scripts.docs:build: BUNDLE_GEMFILE=Gemfile BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle BUNDLE_APP_CONFIG=.bundle BUNDLE_DISABLE_SHARED_GEMS=true bundle exec jekyll build --source docs --destination _site --config docs/_config.yml,docs/_config.local.yml
scripts.docs:serve: BUNDLE_GEMFILE=Gemfile BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle BUNDLE_APP_CONFIG=.bundle BUNDLE_DISABLE_SHARED_GEMS=true bundle exec jekyll serve --source docs --destination _site --config docs/_config.yml,docs/_config.local.yml --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4000
